title: Hammer Enchants
description: Adds enchantments that allow tools to mine many blocks at once.
body:
Inspired by hammers from Tinker's Construct.

Adds enchantments that allow tools to mine many blocks at once.
- Wide Shape (I-III) affects how tall/wide of an area is mined.
- Deep Shape (I-II) affects how many blocks forward are mined.

When both enchantments are used, a tool can mine a 5x3x3 area at once.

![The max mining size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QBrIQ9pr/images/6b8bcbf571f3ee92b19b13b17efa1b241afa1fdd.png)

Additional Features
- Enchanted hoes will till land and break crops!
- Enchanted axes will strip logs, deoxidize copper, etc!
- Enchanted shovels will make path blocks!
- Crouch to only affect blocks of the same type!
- Config options for breaking speed and durability!
- 0 dependencies, no extra bloat!
- !!!!
